query:
SELECT skill_id AS "skill_id!", name AS "name!", status AS "status!",
                      base_name AS "base_name?"
               FROM catalog
               WHERE workspace_id = $1
                 AND (name = $2 OR (base_name = $2 AND status = 'archived'))
               ORDER BY CASE WHEN name = $2 THEN 0 ELSE 1 END
               LIMIT 1
